'''''Les Sith''''' is a [[Wikipedia:French language|French]] young-readers book written by [[Sabine Boccador]] and published on [[October 2]], [[2015]] by [[Fleurus]] as part of the series ''[[La grande imagerie Star Wars]]''.<ref name="Amazon" />

==Publisher's summary==
''The 2nd title in the Star Wars saga. Children will discover the followers of the dark side of the Force, the Sith and their allies. For a better understanding of this famous saga.<ref name="Amazon" />''

==Media==
===Editions===
*{{ISBN|9782215143963}}; [[October 2]], [[2015]]; [[Fleurus]]; French hardcover<ref name="Amazon" />
